title: Europe’s Blind Spot: Delivering Real Connectivity Beyond Just Networks [Promoted Content]
summary_full: Beyond coverage maps, now is the moment for Europe to think about the end-to-end connectivity that citizens and businesses actually need, and build a comprehensive strategy where fibre, mobile, satellite and Wi-Fi are interconnected layers of the same infrastructure.
